channel.title: B. Lesniewska on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in B. Lesniewska on LMI

item.title: Structural Characterization Of Inclusion Complexes Ofpara-Sulphonato-Calix[8]Arene With 1,2-Bis(4-Pyridyl)-Ethane And1,3-Bis(4-Pyridyl)-Propane. New `Double Cone' And `Up-Flat-Down'Conformations Of Para-Sulphonato-Calix[8]Arene
